content:
# Recommendations â€” next plan iter (after iter-081)

## CRITICAL â€” closest to completion
- **SOLO `prove` S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (TensorObjInverse.lean ~L1255): discharge the
  `â˜…pb-iso` residual.** The ~15-iter `restrictFunctor j` instance-diamond barrier is CLEARED (compiling
  code, iter-081). What remains is straight bridge-assembly of the pure pullback-world dual cocycle:
  - collapse the leading `RFIP_j((M|U).dual).symm â‰ªâ‰« RFIP_j` via the new `iso_symm_trans_cancel`
    **applied by `exact`/`refine`** (NOT `rw` â€” keyed `rw` MISSES the c.1 defeq seam, build-confirmed);
  - convert the `(pullbackCongr hjÎ¹).app M.dual â‰ªâ‰« SCP_{V.Î¹} â‰ªâ‰« Î¸_{V.Î¹}` legs into the composite
    `SCP_{jâ‰«U.Î¹} â‰ªâ‰« Î¸_{jâ‰«U.Î¹}` via a **subst-style `pullbackCongr` coherence** = the dual mirror of
    `pullbackTensorMap_pullbackCongr` (L947); state it over free `{f g} (hf : f = g)` and `subst hf`;
  - apply bridge (b) `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict` (PROVEN, this file L1101) + bridge (c)
    `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` (PROVEN, PresheafDualPullback.lean:773) + c.1
    (`pushforwardObjValRestrictIso = Iso.refl`) to decompose `SCP_{jâ‰«U.Î¹} â‰ªâ‰« Î¸_{jâ‰«U.Î¹}` into the
    `pullbackComp` / `(pullback j)(SCP_Uâ‰ªâ‰«Î¸_U)` / `SCP_jâ‰ªâ‰«Î¸_j` / `dualIsoOfIso(restrictFunctorComp)` legs.
  Both sides then match leg-for-leg; the leading `(pullbackComp j U.Î¹)` LHS pairs with the
  `pullbackComp.inv` that (b) introduces.

## DO NOT retry (structural-change required already paid OR disproved)
- **DO NOT re-attempt the iter-080 term-mode `c2_assemble` / `Functor.map_comp`-distribution recipe for
  S3.** Build-DISPROVED iter-081 (whnf-bombs at 6.4M HB â€” `Functor.map` of a metavariable composite
  forces `whnf` across the diamond). The atomic-iso-naturality route is the one that works.
- **DO NOT build the 3 named dual helpers (`presheafDualPullbackComparison_pullbackCongr`,
  `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict_cancel`, per-leg dual coherence) the iter-080 plan required.** That
  plan is obsolete â€” only the single subst-style `pullbackCongr` coherence above is still needed.
- DEAD across iters (still true): `restrictFunctorComp.hom.naturality`; subst/rcases on `hVU:Vâ‰¤U`;
  `simp[restrictIsoUnitOfLE]`; `congr 1`/`Iso.eq_inv_comp`/`Hom.ext`; `rw`/`erw`/`simp` of a category
  lemma across the SheafOfModules `â‰«` seam (use generic single-`[Category C]` lemmas by `exact`/`refine`);
  `Functor.Monoidal (pullback Ï†)` / `pullbackDualMap`.

## HIGH â€” adjacent, partly parallel-able
- **S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (~L1291) is NOT strictly gated on S3 closing** (auditor `iter080`:
  shared seam bridge (b) is proven). It rides on (b) + a Î¸-unit identification (`presheafDualUnitIso_naturality`
  promoted to `j`). Can be pursued partly in parallel with S3 (same file â‡’ same lane, sequence within it).
- **telescope `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (~L2059)** wires the 5 squares (S2/S4b/S4c done); gated on
  S3 + S4a. Telescope close â‡’ whole seed cone sorry-free.

## MEDIUM â€” blueprint coverage debt (blueprint-writer)
- Add blueprint blocks for the 4 new generic helpers (un-blueprinted, dag-unmatched): `mapIso_naturality`,
  `mapIso_naturality_assoc`, `iso_cancel_left`, `iso_symm_trans_cancel` (TensorObjInverse.lean ~L1126â€“1155).
  Each is a reusable single-`[Category]` coherence brick (not S3-specific).
- Update `lem:dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` proof-route prose to the atomic-iso-naturality form (the
  `% NOTE` was refreshed this review; the body prose still leans on the old framing). Trim `\uses`
  over-credit (`dualisoofiso_trans`, `image_preimage_of_le` are parent-telescope ingredients).
- dag unmatched = 125 lean_aux nodes (4 new this iter; the other 121 are standing coverage debt).

## LOW â€” comment hygiene (.lean; prover/refactor, NOT review's domain)
- **DualInverse.lean** `dual_isLocallyTrivial` docstring (auditor major): a nested block comment claims
  `dual_restrict_iso` is "PARTIAL â€” Step-4 isoMk naturality sorry at ~L546", but the sorry was closed by
  `subsingleton` (L196-199). Stale by ~many iters; will mislead planning. Fix when next editing the file.
- TensorObjInverse.lean: add a co-located justification comment for the `set_option maxHeartbeats 6400000`
  on S3 (S2's matching bump has one); `exists_tensorObj_inverse` docstring carries 50-iter-old labels.

## Convergence note for the planner
- iter-081 is an **honest PARTIAL with a genuine structural advance, not churn**: the diamond â€” the hard
  part flagged across ~15 iters â€” is what got cleared. The residual changed KIND (diamond/seam wall â†’
  pre-known bridge-assembly), and the named bridges already exist and are proven. progress-critic is NOT
  warranted next iter unless the planner re-attempts the disproved term-mode recipe. If the `â˜…pb-iso`
  bridge-assembly does NOT close next iter, that is the first true stall on this residual â€” effort-break
  `â˜…pb-iso` into the `pullbackCongr`-coherence piece + the leg-matching piece, do not grind.
